case_title: ZHU WEN XU VS. LONNY ESQUIVEL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY XU, ZHU WEN AS TO DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL, LONNY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-21-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-11-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL, LONNY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-21-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-21-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. TERRENCE CHO INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF XU, ZHU WEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ESQUIVEL, LONNY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-21-2012 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON MAY 29, 2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
